---
title: ""
---

# Amandeep Singh

## Experimental Quantum Physicist

**Postdoctoral Fellow**  
Institute of Applied Physics  
The Hebrew University of Jerusalem

---

### Research

I develop solid-state defects for quantum sensing and quantum technologies, with research spanning quantum sensing, quantum magnetic imaging, quantum control, scientific instrumentation, nanofabrication, and open-source software.

---

### Current Research Areas

- Quantum Sensing
- Quantum Magnetic Imaging
- Quantum Control
- Scientific Software
- Nanofabrication & Characterization

---

### Featured Projects

- NV Control Framework (Python)
- Microwave-Free Quantum Magnetic Imaging
- Event Camera-Based Quantum Magnetic Imaging
- Lock-in Camera-Based Quantum Magnetic Imaging
- Quantum Machines OPX Control

---

*Professional website currently under development.*
